language-bash shiki shiki-themes material-theme-lighter material-theme material-theme-palenight

cd back
cp .env.example .env # Set FIREFLY_URL + database config
composer install --no-dev
php artisan key:generate
php artisan migrate
php artisan serve # Or serve via Nginx/Apache

cd front
npm install
npm run build
npm run prod # Or use PM2
